content.full_text:
January 29, 1990

Ms. Jeanne Pritchard  
Division Chief, Technical Assistance and Analysis Division  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Ms. Pritchard:

This letter requests informal assistance under Government Code, Section 83114(b). I am requesting this advice as a person with a duty to advise other persons relating to their duties under the Political Reform Act ("the Act"). (2 California Code of Regulations, Section 18329(c)(1)).

Section 84211 of the Government Code requires each campaign statement to contain the cumulative amount of contributions received from a person contributing $100 or more with that person's full name, street address, occupation, employer and the date and amount of each contribution received during the period as well as the cumulative amount of contributions. Lately, we have encountered difficulty in obtaining occupation and employer information from contributors. Specifically, what steps must we take to obtain occupation and employer information, so as to be in compliance with section 84211? If we send a letter to a contributor asking for the information and no response is received, what additional steps must we take? If we sub-contract with a caging firm that sends a letter similar to the attached and no reply is received, does that satisfy the requirement contained in 84211? If not, what further steps must be taken?

Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

Cary Davidson

CD:lb

Attachment

SCHEDULE A INFORMATION REQUEST

10/16/89

DEAR [Name]:

According to our records, you generously contributed to our "[Campaign Name]" campaign last year.

The state election law which regulates political campaigns, requires us to record the full name, address and occupation of all persons who gave $25.00 or more to any campaign we sponsor.

Unfortunately, we do not have this information on file for you. Please take a moment to fill out the attached form and return it to me in the postage-free envelope today. Your prompt action will help us fully comply with the law.

Thank you once again for your support of our cause.

[Signature]
President

IMPORTANT! STATE LAW REQUIRES THE FOLLOWING INFORMATION NOW.

Occupation

Name of Employer

If self employed, please print name of business
